steps.title: Use the zero point
steps.content:
The graph passes through $(-25,0)$, so
$$0=a\sqrt{-25+b}$$
Because $f(25)<0$, $a$ cannot be $0$. Therefore,
$$\sqrt{-25+b}=0$$
$$b=25$$

steps.title: Use the negative output
steps.content:
Substitute $$b=25$$ into the value at $$x=25$$
$$f(25)=a\sqrt{25+25}=a\sqrt{50}$$
Since $$\sqrt{50}>0$$ and $f(25)<0$, it follows that $a<0$.

steps.title: Compare the constants
steps.content: Since $a<0$ and $$b=25$$, the required comparison is $$aD.
